entry.title: Our song
entry.summary:
Author: Tristan_24

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,483Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Buck and Eddie met when they were young, get separated, then reunite by a song they both loved at the time.

entry.title: intermeddle
entry.summary:
Author: paleredheadinascifi

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,669Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 70

Summary: Buck would rather stab himself in the neck with a fork, thrice, than let Maddie and Eddie say a single word to each other.His concern is that they will become friends. Allies. Allies United Against Buck. Comrades Who Know Too Much About Buck. A terrifying, powerful joint force that simply cannot ever exist.He will make sure of it. Or, so that Maddie and Eddie do not ever mingle, Buck meddles.

entry.title: Courage, Thy Name Is Tequila
entry.summary:
Author: untoldchaos

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,995Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 541

Summary: “We don’t have drinks. I should get some,” Eddie offered as an excuse.“No, you stay, I’ll get it.”Before Eddie could insist, he was silenced by the view of Buck standing up from the water, swim trunks dripping wet and plastered to his large, muscular thighs. Every curve of his body was accentuated in that moment. It was like a slow motion Baywatch scene and Eddie was no better than a horny teenager.Buck's housewarming party ends in the hot tub, where one thing leads to another, and Eddie finds himself feeling very attracted to his best friend.

entry.title: The Family We Chose
entry.summary:
Author: Pnk_strawberry1

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 65,667Chapters: 15/18Kudos: 328

Summary: Evan Buckley was truly fucked. One week after leaving the only home he’d ever known—his parents’ house—Ground Zero hit, and the world went to hell. Eight months later, he’s still searching for his sister Maddie in Los Angeles, armed only with a tear-stained note: “I’m leaving Doug. I’m going to Los Angeles.” When Buck finally tracks her to Safe Zone 118, he realizes that maybe having a family—and surviving alongside people who actually care—isn’t so bad. At 118, firefighter Eddie Diaz, a single dad, turned his fire station into a refuge with his team when Ground Zero struck. Just trying to keep his kids safe, he’s thrown for a loop when a stranger shows up claiming to be Maddie’s brother. Buck is skilled, prepared, and oddly magnetic—forcing Eddie to question everything he thought he knew about survival, trust, and maybe even… something more.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: This Is Not A Fanfic
entry.summary:
Author: TheUnicycle

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,263Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 8

Summary: "You know, sneezing on my new pillow seems like the kind of thing someone might call rude," Eddie says casually. "Covering your mouth when you sneeze is like, basic hygiene, Eddie. It's polite." He sniffles. "Getting snot all over my pillow doesn't seem very hygienic or polite." Buck opens his mouth to argue that he didn't 'get snot all over it', but his eyes flick to it, and. Well.

entry.title: to live for the hope of it all
entry.summary:
Author: opiumashes

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,504Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 8,071

Summary: Eddie freezes at the doorway, tray in hand, the voices drifting from inside stopping him cold. “Oh, your stepdad doesn’t live with you?” Mark asks, gesturing to a framed photo of Buck and Christopher. There’s a beat of silence—too long, too loaded.Eddie’s heart stutters, thudding hard against his ribs as he waits, breath held. God's really decided to test him today. Then Christopher answers, casually, like it’s the easiest thing in the world. “No… he lives in L.A.”or Eddie overhears a conversation between Christopher and his friend, then proceeds to spiral about being in love with Buck while also being insanely jealous of 118's new recruit

entry.title: Winning the Race (Just for you)
entry.summary:
Author: JJsCurse

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,849Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Bobby puts Buck in the 800 meters for the first time which he's not used to longer distance, and he meets a dark-haired brunette with brown eyes who gives him attitude before the race even starts. Buck keeps up with anger and hint of jealousy fueling him. Buck thinks this is the last time he has to run against him but turns out he's very wrong. The road leads them to a very close relationship, closer than they expected.

entry.title: Lessons in Sleuthing and Seductions (Intentionally and Very Much Romantically)
entry.summary:
Author: shrimprangoon

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,130Chapters: 7/10Kudos: 490

Summary: Buck needs to know what’s in that box. “Oh no. I know that face,” Eddie sighs. “You’re about to become weird about this, aren’t you?” “Aren’t you curious about what’s in the box Eddie??” “Not curious enough to get stabbed.” Buck ponders the downsides of getting stabbed versus getting answers. “Buck.” “No, I know! I know!” he concedes. “I, Even Buck Buckley, promise not to get myself stabbed in the noble pursuit of knowledge.”   meanwhile...   Wife City 💅 Eddie: How do I get Buck to look at me disrespectfully? Maddie: no   Or: the one where Buck is living in a mystery romcom while Eddie is stuck in horny jail hell.

entry.title: Take My Hand (You'll Like It)
entry.summary:
Author: sn4keb1tes

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,934Chapters: 7/15Kudos: 92

Summary: Somewhere between watching them leave and contemplating on the ridiculousness of his situation with Mr. and Mrs. Williams, Buck willed himself to walk out of the station. He didn't really remember how he got to his car, all he knew was that his hand was on the handle to open the door. He was about to get in when Eddie came up behind him and said, “You're coming over.” “Are you asking me or telling me?” “Telling, follow me home.” Buck's very rarely, if ever, been one to tell Eddie no so he did what Eddie told him to, he followed him home. He'd follow Eddie into an active volcano, following him to 4995 South Bedford was nothing.Or: Buck and Eddie are in love with each other, their souls have known it since they met each other, their minds, however, take a while to catch up. Or: Eight year long situationship turns into an eleven year long situationship after very ill advised sex.

entry.title: Buprenorphine and Brandywines
entry.summary:
Author: pyrolysis (bertrandsbakingchannel)

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,720Chapters: 4/10Kudos: 27

Summary: Eddie Diaz doesn’t remember most of his life going by. Buck’s been talking about it lately (when he actually talks to Eddie about things that matters), about how fast they’re getting older. Eddie isn’t sure he’s ready to be satisfied with what he’s done with life. Eddie isn’t sure he’s done everything he wants to yet, but maybe he should try to.   Eddie trying to do things that make him happy, but he sucks at it. Or, how Eddie Diaz mistakes chest pain for happiness.

entry.title: And If I Drown, What Then?
entry.summary:
Author: Allypop_84

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 43,853Chapters: 12/30Kudos: 623

Summary: Post-lawsuit, Buck fights to reclaim his place at the 118. But the team he came back for doesn’t quite feel like home anymore, and the distance between him and Eddie keeps widening. Buck feels himself slowly disappearing - first from the team, then from himself. He's always been good at saving other people. He's never been good at saving himself. Or A Buck and Eddie post-lawsuit fic. ----------- Please heed the tags! This fic explores alcohol and substance abuse and may be triggering for some readers. If these themes are difficult for you, please put yourself first.

entry.title: you got me (looking in the mirror for ghosts)
entry.summary:
Author: thisismyuniverse

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,047Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 49

Summary: After coming to terms with his feelings for Buck, Eddie’s libido is out of control. He gets tired of his hand and orders a toy that he doesn’t know is connected to the object of his desire. Meanwhile Buck is getting fucked within an inch of his life, bewildered but along for the ride.

entry.title: Come get me out of California
entry.summary:
Author: tofana

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,922Chapters: 3/9Kudos: 35

Summary: In 2007, Evan Buckley, Eddie Diaz and Shannon Kelley meet in high school.In 2019, Evan Buckley and Eddie Diaz attend Shannon Diaz’s funeral.A lot of love, hate, jealousy and tragedy happens between them in the span of twelve years. or From the first time to the last time Buck, Eddie and Shannon are all in a room together.Teenage friends AU.
